title: Instrument plan-pack orchestration
summary: Add telemetry to representative plan read and write orchestration paths, including sync, initiative lifecycle, and task lifecycle flows.
scope_items: Instrument plan sync command dispatch and coordination rebuild flows.
Instrument initiative bootstrap, readiness, approval, and closeout orchestration.
Instrument task create, update, and transition write paths with pack-specific context.
done_when_items: Representative plan commands emit telemetry with initiative, task, or sync context when available.
Plan integration coverage proves host, core, and pack layers cooperate under telemetry.
